DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system. ## The Format A DESIGN.md file combines machine-readable design tokens (YAML front matter) with human-readable design rationale (markdown prose). container

`container` is a tool that you can use to create and run Linux containers as lightweight virtual machines on your Mac. It's written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
